purpose: Define restore source precedence and Git filemode normalization so restores do not lose current working deltas or block on mode-only drift.

mode_normalization.mode_only_allowed_when: numstat rows are all 0/0 and diff summary only reports mode changes

staging_rules: Never restore directly into active root.
Extract ZIPs or copy candidate roots into /mnt/data/_stage/<restore_id>/ first.
Validate required files in staging before promotion.
Promote only after hash, git, and capability checks pass.
promotion_rules: Back up active root before promotion.
Do not overwrite active root from stable ZIP when current working pointer is valid.
If pointer and ledger are unavailable, stable baseline restore is allowed only with verified sidecar or repair receipt.
After promotion, normalize core.filemode=false before status checks.
proof_cases_required: ledger latest PASS outranks stable ZIP when pointer is absent
stable ZIP requires verified manifest or explicit repair receipt
non_goals: F5 does not implement a restore CLI.
F5 does not promote or replace active root.
F5 does not export a stable baseline.
